title: Our paper accepted at AutoSys 2026
body: We are thrilled to announce that our paper titled 'Toward Stateful Generative Environments from Structured Content' accpeted to be presented at AutoSys 2026.

title: Our paper accepted at CHI 2026
body: We are thrilled to announce that our paper titled 'Motor-Mediated Creativity: Bridging Embodied Skill Training and Digital Expression' accpeted to be presented at CHI 2026.

title: New Research Grant
body: Understanding Temporal Dynamics of Core Cognitive Functions for Individualised Learning, Ministry of Education (MOE) Tier 1, PI (Project Level): Thivya KANDAPPU, 2023, S$123,755.
